goals: Summarize the strongest published strategies and examples for naringenin
Distill recurring bottlenecks and unresolved questions from the literature
Turn evidence synthesis into the next set of editable project decisions

project_context.project_goal: Identify literature for improving naringenin production in engineered yeast.
project_context.focus_area: Literature synthesis, benchmark mapping, and open-question framing
starter_questions: What are the most successful reported strategies and benchmark examples for naringenin production?
Which open questions, improvement levers, or recurring bottlenecks show up across recent work?
